words.example_english: Talk shop to someone else.

words.example_italian: Non vale la pena andare lì.
words.example_english: It isn't worthwhile going there.

words.example_italian: Io l'ho conosciuto tre anni fa.
words.example_english: I got acquainted with him three years ago.

words.example_italian: Tom lo sa che lavora qui?
words.example_english: Does Tom know you work here?

words.example_italian: Io ho un dolore alle spalle.
words.example_english: I have a pain in my shoulders.

words.example_italian: Lui passò la serata a leggere.
words.example_english: He spent the evening reading.

words.example_italian: Noi saremo qui per un po'.
words.example_english: We'll be here for a while.

words.example_italian: Lo vedo a volte in TV.
words.example_english: I sometimes see him on TV.

words.example_italian: Io non potevo dire di no.
words.example_english: I couldn't say no.

words.example_italian: A te è piaciuta la partita?
words.example_english: Did you enjoy the game?

words.example_italian: Sono le otto e un quarto.
words.example_english: It’s a quarter past eight.

words.example_italian: Jim è nel mio libro nero.
words.example_english: Jim is in my black book.

words.example_italian: Ci sono dei cinema in zona?
words.example_english: Are there any cinemas in the area?

words.example_italian: I soldati lo potrebbero vedere ora.
words.example_english: The soldiers could see him now.

words.example_italian: Tom trovò per me un taxi.
words.example_english: Tom found me a taxi.

words.example_italian: Non sei al passo coi tempi.
words.example_english: You aren't in step with the times.

words.example_italian: A che ora apre il negozio?
words.example_english: What time does the store open?

words.example_italian: Tom non è riuscito a finire.
words.example_english: Tom didn't get to finish.

words.example_italian: Le ho detto che stavi venendo.
words.example_english: I told her you were coming.

words.example_italian: Lei ti sta aspettando a casa.
words.example_english: She's waiting for you at home.

words.example_italian: La dottoressa si tolse i guanti.
words.example_english: The doctor removed her gloves.

words.example_italian: Non posso continuare a fare ciò.
words.example_english: I can't keep doing this.

words.example_italian: Un poliziotto è venuto da me.
words.example_english: A policeman came up to me.

words.example_italian: Dov'è la fine di questa linea?
words.example_english: Where is the end of this line?

words.example_italian: Si mise di fronte a me.
words.example_english: He placed himself in front of me.

words.example_italian: Voi non siete più da soli.
words.example_english: You aren't alone anymore.

words.example_italian: Tom è il mio ex moroso.
words.example_english: Tom is my ex-boyfriend.

words.example_italian: Tom era seduto lì in silenzio.
words.example_english: Tom sat there in silence.

words.example_italian: Tom è sicuramente un buon marito.
words.example_english: Tom certainly is a good husband.

words.example_italian: Io non so chi ha vinto.
words.example_english: I don't know who won.

words.example_italian: Non intendo una mancanza di rispetto.
words.example_english: I mean no disrespect.

words.example_italian: Lui ha negato di averlo fatto.
words.example_english: He denied having done it.

words.example_italian: E qual è la buona notizia?
words.example_english: And what is the good news?

words.example_italian: A chi era scritta la lettera?
words.example_english: Who was the letter written to?

words.example_italian: L'acqua era calma e molto blu.
words.example_english: The water was calm and very blue.

words.example_italian: È importante che lui lo senta.
words.example_english: It's important that he hears this.
